stream_required: B.E / B.Tech (CSE, IT) B.Sc (Graphics & Designing) BCA, MCA

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months Internship : Rs 30,000 pm Salary after 6 months Internship (On confirmation) : CTC 6 LPA (4 LPA {Fixed in hand} + 2 LPA variable)
package_salary.bond: Sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA), which strictly prohibits engaging in any freelance or external work while employed full-time at NB Media.
